name: linkedin-scraper
description: Scrape LinkedIn profiles and company pages using Apify actors — extract professional data, work history, and company info without manual browsing.

pillars.supervised: User confirmation before scraping operations and data extraction
pillars.secured: Apify API token authentication, rate limiting, LinkedIn ToS awareness
pillars.agents: R=profile-extraction+company-intel, T=Apify API, M=LinkedIn data, P=scraping pipeline
